title: The Strongest Exorcist
overview: On the verge of death, an exorcist decides to reincarnate to lead a perfect life.  He is reborn as Seika, the youngest of an aristocratic family.  While nobility and magic go hand in hand, the young boy, devoid of mana, must face the mockery of his family.

title: Academy City Lodonea
overview: Thanks to his victory against the eldernewt, Seika has earned the respect of his people.  As a reward for his feat, his father allows him to join the magic academy.  Gray, jealous, does not hear it that way.

title: The Hero the Oracles Spoke Of
overview: Seika arrives at the academy only to quickly fight himself in a fight with a terrible devil.

title: Dungeon Trap
overview: Inglis makes a new friend after a complex battle involving the leader of the Bloodchain Brigade.

title: Mabel Crane
overview: Seika meets a powerful girl named Mabel and heads to a combat tournament in the capital.

title: Interwoven Plots
overview: Seika makes his way through the tournament while he searches to find out what's really going on.

title: Brother and Sister
overview: The truth about Kyle and Mabel is revealed.

title: Yifa's Feelings
overview: Seika heads to another country to investigate a rampaging dragon.

title: Yifa's Resolve
overview: Seika finds the dragon's abode in the mountains and now faces a whole new challenge.  Meanwhile, however, the prince plans to take advantage of Seika's absence.  Yifa is in a bind.

title: The Holy Princess
overview: Seika meets a princess with the power to see the future.

title: Future Sight
overview: Seika comes to learn more of Fiona and her powers.

title: The Most Terrible Demon King
overview: Seika unleashes his power against a group of demon assassins.

title: A New Journey
overview: Seika unleashes his power against a group of demon assassins.
